name: SOTHERLY HOTELS LP
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Organization Sotherly Hotels Inc. (the Company) is a self-managed and self-administered lodging real estate investment trust, or REIT, that was formed in August 2004 to own, acquire, renovate and reposition full-service, primarily upscale and upper-upscale hotel properties located in primary markets in the mid-Atlantic and southern United States.
